channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Jersey Uses Glock Lawsuit to Create Gun Registry Politicians Denied Wanting
item.description: Subpoenas for buyer details from New Jersey Glock dealers go beyond crime investigation.

item.title: The Specter of State-Controlled Industrial Policy
item.description: Abandon hope, all ye who enter here.

item.title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Increasingly Looks Like An Epic Disaster
item.description: When Christopher Nolan's new The Odyssey film was announced, many people were understandably excited. Although composed nearly three millennia ago, th...

item.title: Takeaways from Tuesday's primaries: Massie's loss leaves no doubt about Trump's power over the GOP
item.description: President Trump scored another win Tuesday against a Republican rival, dislodging Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky's primary and knocking out one of his...
